# quesa-source-build

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Target | quesa |
| Type | source-reimplementation-build |
| Status | planned |

## Public Notes

Planned reproduction recipe for rebuilding Quesa as a public QuickDraw 3D API compatibility lane.

## Environment

- clean checkout of the public Quesa repository at the recorded quesa-master-head commit
- host compiler and platform dependencies selected from public repository files
- public/open QuickDraw 3D compatibility examples or procedural test inputs
- no proprietary Apple SDK redistributables committed to this repository
- local build transcript and compatibility notes captured as derived metadata

## Steps

- clone or update the public Quesa source repository listed in the artifact record
- verify the local checkout commit against the quesa-master-head snapshot record
- use public repository metadata and release-history sources to identify supported platforms and dependency assumptions
- configure and compile the QuickDraw 3D API reimplementation with public/open dependencies
- run a minimal public-safe API or scene smoke test when available
- record build commands, compatibility notes, diagnostics, produced outputs, and dependency gaps as public metadata
- promote repeatable commands into the Quesa / QuickDraw 3D compatibility packet

## Expected Outputs

- source snapshot manifest
- build environment manifest
- compiler transcript
- library output inventory
- QuickDraw 3D compatibility notes
- public-safe smoke-test notes
- dependency gap list

## Artifacts

- quesa-source-reimplementation
- quesa-16d13-release-report
- quickdraw-3d-documentation-qa
- quickdraw-3d-manual-154-public-pdf
